description: Initial reference catalog of tours outside Cusco for My Cusco Trip. Rates are marked as reference values until actual operator costs are received.
sourceNotes: Estructura creada para All Experience and product.html.
Do not use reference prices as final rates without commercial validation.
Do not search includes/excludes for filters; use the search object.

products.title: Colonial and Modern Lima City Tour
products.shortDescription: Route through Lima’s historic center, squares, colonial mansions, churches and modern areas of the city.
products.description: Reference half-day tour to discover the main highlights of colonial and modern Lima. Includes a panoramic route through tourist districts and a visit to the historic center according to the confirmed operation.

internalPricing.notes: Reference rate until actual operator costs are received.

includes: Professional guide in Spanish and English

itinerary.title: Pickup and departure
itinerary.description: Pickup from hotel or coordinated meeting point.

itinerary.title: Modern Lima
itinerary.description: Scenic route through tourist areas such as Miraflores or San Isidro, according to the confirmed operation.

itinerary.title: Historic center
itinerary.description: Visit squares, colonial streets and the exteriors of historic buildings.

itinerary.title: Return
itinerary.description: Return to the hotel or coordinated point.

paymentOptions.partialPaymentLabel: Reserve with USD 10 per person and confirm the balance according to the operation

seo.title: Colonial and Modern Lima City Tour | My Cusco Trip
seo.description: Route through Lima’s historic center, squares, colonial mansions, churches and modern areas of the city.

faq.q: How long does the experience last?
faq.a: The reference duration is 3 to 4 hours. The final schedule is coordinated before departure so you clearly know the pickup, visits and return time.

faq.q: Does the tour include a guide?
faq.a: Yes. All our tours include a professional guide in Spanish and English. Other languages are available upon request/coordination and may have an additional cost.

faq.q: Which tickets or extras should I consider?
faq.a: If a special entrance ticket applies for your date, the reservations team will review it with you before payment.

faq.q: Where does the service start?
faq.a: Pickup or the meeting point is coordinated according to the tour, your hotel and the operation of the day. We send the final details by WhatsApp or email before the experience.

faq.q: What should I bring?
faq.a: We recommend bringing your passport or ID, water, sun protection, comfortable clothes, a light jacket and cash for personal expenses or tickets not included.

products.title: Ballestas Islands Tour
products.shortDescription: Navigate to the Ballestas Islands to observe marine wildlife, guano birds, sea lions and the Paracas Candelabro.
products.description: Classic boat excursion from Paracas to the Ballestas Islands, ideal for observing marine wildlife and coastal landscapes. Operation depends on sea conditions and port authorization.

itinerary.description: Route around the islands to observe sea lions, birds and local wildlife.

itinerary.title: Return to the pier
itinerary.description: Return to Paracas after the boat ride.
